purpose: Tools that return inline image bytes bypass the bmg PreToolUse:Read hook. This file is consumed by the bmg deny-inline PreToolUse hook (Phase 5) to block such tools so every image flows through a filesystem path and is intercepted by the Read hook. User-editable at ~/.config/bmg/deny_inline.json.

verified_against.method: ToolSearch select: of every mcp__claude-in-chrome__* tool, classified by return shape from the schema description

tools.name: mcp__claude-in-chrome__computer
tools.reason: screenshot/zoom actions return inline image bytes
tools.safe_alternative: set save_to_disk=true so the screenshot lands on disk; the next Read of that path is intercepted by the bmg hook. Or use gif_creator (always writes a file).

tools.name: mcp__claude-in-chrome__browser_batch
tools.reason: tool description: 'Screenshots and other images are returned interleaved with outputs'
tools.safe_alternative: split the batch: run the screenshot/zoom via computer with save_to_disk=true outside the batch; pass the path into subsequent calls.

tools.name: mcp__claude-in-chrome__javascript_tool
tools.reason: returns the last expression value; could in principle return a data:image/ string or other base64 image payload
tools.runtime_check: if the returned value matches /^data:image\//i or begins with PNG/JPEG magic bytes, surface a warning

tools.name: mcp__claude-in-chrome__gif_creator
tools.reason: export downloads a file; no inline image bytes returned to agent context

tools.name: mcp__claude-in-chrome__read_network_requests
tools.reason: text/JSON; image responses are summarized as URL+headers

tools.name: mcp__claude-in-chrome__file_upload
tools.reason: uploads files FROM disk to the page

tools.name: mcp__claude-in-chrome__upload_image
tools.reason: uploads previously captured imageId; no new bytes produced

decision_categories.deny_when: block the tool call when the predicate matches; return a deny with a clear message pointing to the safe_alternative
decision_categories.watch: allow the call but inspect the result; warn (do not block) if the runtime_check matches
decision_categories.allow: no action needed; tool does not return inline image bytes
